clusters.label: Headline long-term benchmark datasets (CSV/NPZ) and their precomputed temporal Q-matrices are not shipped in the repo (only weather/short-term data present); abstract/README claim datasets are available
OLinear-C per-dataset channel-correlation matrices (*_COV_channel_*.npy) missing for all datasets except weather
requirements.txt pins no versions (all dependencies floating; no Python/CUDA/torch spec)
requirements.txt lists wrong PyPI name 'pywt' (should be PyWavelets); pip install fails on the wavelet-ablation import path
patoolib and tqdm imported (via m4.py) but absent from requirements.txt
No code aggregates the reported std-dev / 99% CI / Student's t-test over seeds; seed hardcoded to 2023 with no usable multi-seed harness
No baseline model code or scripts for the OrthoTrans/NormLin plug-in experiments (Tables 5, 9, 24); only OLinear variants in model/
run.py driver selects/reports the 'global best' as the minimum test-set MSE+MAE across itr seeds, lamda1 grid, and test_batch_size (best-on-test selection)
exp_forecast.py test() reports the intermediate decoder stage with the lowest test-set MSE+MAE (best-stage-on-test; dead/gated off for the shipped single-tensor OLinear models)
Generate_corrmat.ipynb has hardcoded Windows/absolute paths and processes one hardcoded file per run; not parameterized, will not run as-is
Q/correlation-matrix notebook hardcodes train_ratio=0.7 for the channel-correlation slice, inconsistent with the 0.6 train split used by ETT/PEMS in data_loader
OrthoTrans/channel Q-matrices computed from the training portion only (no look-ahead leakage) — verified, no concern
run.py references Exp_Short_Term_Forecast / Exp_Long_Term_Forecast_Partial / Exp_Imputation that are never imported (NameError if those branches are invoked)
Basis-ablation scripts pass model names (OLinear_wavelet_concat/OLinear_wavelet2_concat) absent from the model registry (KeyError)
OLinear_C uses `assert ValueError(...)` which never raises when the channel-corr file is missing, leaving channel_corr_mat unset
OrthoTrans forward pass adds learnable additive biases delta1/delta2 that are absent from the paper's transform equations
Early-stopping patience mismatch: paper states 10, but shipped scripts use 5/8/10 depending on dataset
Test loss is computed and printed every training epoch (checkpoint selection still uses validation loss; benign but distinct observation)
Stage-2 latent restoration network R_theta (and its Eq.7 L_Res training phase) is absent; Stage-2 just auto-encodes the degraded input through the LoRA-VAE
No evaluation/inference/test script and val.metrics disabled in configs, so no reported PSNR/SSIM/LPIPS/FID/etc. number is reproducible
No dependency specification (requirements.txt/setup.py/environment.yml/pyproject.toml) despite non-trivial third-party imports
Pretrained Stage-1 VAE / DINOv2 weights and benchmark UHD datasets are not shipped and have no fetch script/URL; configs point at non-existent ./weights and ./datasets paths
README is a 16-byte one-line title stub: no install/run commands, no results table, no data/weights instructions
Stage-2 config requests vae_config.type 'RAVAE', which is never registered (only RAVAE_EQ) -> ARCH_REGISTRY.get raises KeyError at build
Training experiments_root hardcoded to author cluster path /fs-computility/ai4sData/liuyidi/model instead of root_path; training cannot write off the authors' machine
Hardcoded author-machine absolute paths injected via sys.path.append in core modules (train.py, LHVAE_arch.py, attention.py, encoder_3.py)
Decoder (PHF-LoRA) step adds an HF-fidelity L1 term to the GAN loss, whereas paper Eq. 9 (L_HFGAN) is a pure adversarial loss
Stage-1 equivariance loss L_Eqv uses the PDPS-perturbed-input latent, not the clean-image latent z_clean as in Eq. 5
Stage-1 LInv/DINOv2 loaded from a local weight path (empty/missing by default) and via torch.hub network call, undocumented
Table 5(c) latent-restoration backbones (Restormer/NAFNet/SFHformer) have no standalone code and are never registered/imported
Both encoder and decoder LoRA branches stay active at alpha=0.5 in both FHF and PHF steps; paper says the non-trained side uses frozen base params
Stage-1 reconstruction loss encodes the PDPS-perturbed image rather than I_clean as written in Eq. 2 (clean->clean reconstruction)
PDPS severity and interpolation (beta) schedules implemented as plain linear ramps in iteration
Unsupervised CSM epoch-selection procedure absent; per-dataset epochs (1-5000, matching Table 5) only hardcoded as an if/elif lookup
No code for the explainability contribution (Fig. 4 MNIST attribution, Table 3 ExactMatch/Jaccard, App. D.4.2)
Friedman + Nemenyi significance tests and critical-difference diagrams (App. D.5, Figs 21-22) have no code
TCCM gets per-dataset tuned epochs (1-5000) while all baselines run at library/default configs (asymmetric tuning)
AggregateResults.py writes only CSVs and produces no plots; README promises Rank_ROC.pdf / Rank_PR.pdf (Fig. 2 box plots) it never emits
run_knn.sh invokes nonexistent Full_experiments.py (actual file is FullExperiments.py); fails immediately
run_contamination.sh loops model index 0..10 (11 values) but only 10 models exist; index 10 -> IndexError
RobustnessStudy plot reads false-negative data for the false-positive figure and vice versa (FP/FN labels/files swapped)
requirements.txt pins torch==1.13.1 but paper states PyTorch 2.0
Force-inductive bash loop {45..50} runs only 6 of the 7 *_semisup models, omitting the 7th (KNN_semisup/INNE_semisup index 51)
Cannot verify the per-dataset CSM epoch selection avoided the labeled test split; no validation split exists in the repo
Appendix ablation/sensitivity figures (Fig. 5 epoch-sensitivity, Fig. 16 normalization, Fig. 17 interpolation, AE+TimeEmbedding) have no producing code
Theory-validation figures (Fig. 1 2D contraction field, Fig. 6 per-dimension score boxplots) have no producing code
AggregateResults.py defaults to --semi_only=True (inductive variants), not the transductive main-paper Figure 2 setting
Headline inference-speedup ratios (1573x/85.9x/4864x) and Fig. 3 runtime plot have no computing script
determine_FMAD_hyperparameters has no else branch; unknown dataset name triggers UnboundLocalError
GOAD baseline overridden with n_epoch=25, contradicting the 'default configurations' claim
Failed/timed-out/OOM runs imputed AUC=PR=-1 and ranked worst rather than excluded
HQ-VSR video processing pipeline (Sec 3.3 metadata/scene/quality/motion filtering, Eq.8, Table 1d ablation) not implemented in repo
No script computes the FasterVQA metric reported across Table 2 / Fig. 1
eval_dover.py imports external DOVER package (and related VQA metric trees) that is not vendored or in requirements
eval_ewarp.py non-runnable: chdir into nonexistent finetune/scripts/RAFT and import of nonexistent ewarp module
inference.sh hardcodes --gt datasets/test/UDM10/GT for all datasets (SPMCS/YouHQ40/RealVSR/MVSR4x/VideoLQ scored against wrong GT)
eval_dover.py off-by-one: per-sample DOVER scores cyclically shifted via dover_results[i-1]
No timing/benchmark script measures the Table 3 / Fig. 1 running times (28x speed-up claim)
requirements.txt omits/unpins version-sensitive core deps (diffusers, pyiqa, safetensors, etc.) installed via ad-hoc README pip lines
UDM10 used simultaneously as training-time validation set and reported Table 1 ablation / Table 2 test set
RealVSR/MVSR4x run with upscale=1 (vs paper's x4) and padding removal hardcodes *4, over-cropping those runs
PSNR/SSIM computed on full-frame RGB by default rather than Y-channel; paper does not specify convention
No similarity-metric code (MDD/ACD/SD/KD/ED/DTW/SHR) for Tables 1, D.3-D.14; some runs bundle baselines+utility into the same finding
No baseline-model code/config (TimeVAE/TimeVQVAE/RtsGAN/SdeGAN/LS4) in the repo
No TTM downstream-forecasting utility pipeline (RMSE/MASE/WQL) for Table 2
Only 2 of the ~12-14 benchmark datasets shipped; no fetch/preprocess scripts for the rest
Section 6 text-conditioned generation / kNN accuracy 0.81 (Fig. 2) not wired in / not reproducible
Generation requires a fine-tuned vLLM checkpoint that is not shipped and has no obtaining/training instructions
NeurIPS availability statement promises reproduction scripts for method and baselines that are absent
trainer.py dataset.shape(1) calls a tuple - TypeError on numpy-array training branch (should be shape[1])
Generation while-loop OR-guard makes min_outputs_to_generate clause dead/inert
embedding_dim='auto' computed once for channel 0 and frozen/reused for all later channels (loop-variable mutation bug)
Shipped config uses 100 training epochs; paper states a maximum of 200 (r07#5 also bundles the auto-vs-k=3 difference)
Shipped task configs default embedding_dim='auto' (variance 0.7) instead of the paper's fixed k=3
Default inference temperature 1.3 not stated in the paper's parameter list
Early-stopping validation windows overlap (~54%) the training windows
StandardScaler fit on all windows before the train/validation split (leakage)
Norm/IQR filter uses plain L2 norm; appendix A.3 describes squared L2-norm
No multi-seed driver despite results 'averaged across 5 seeds' (fixed seed 42, FastICA random_state=0)
No driver script reproduces ablation Tables D.1/D.2/D.5/D.8/D.9 (variance, rejection, timing, LLM sweep)
